message:
feat(fnp-python): native setdiff1d via UFuncArray::setdiff1d

Port np.setdiff1d out of the passthrough pool for assume_unique=false
matched-dtype real numeric inputs. assume_unique=true preserves numpy's
order-preserving path, so routes back to np.setdiff1d. Complex,
integer-sidecar, and mixed-dtype inputs also fall back.

br-franken_numpy-hswb
